title: HEARTS FOR SENIORS - 211info
text: HEARTS WITH A MISSION MEDFORD HEARTS FOR SENIORS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a volunteer-based companion care program for seniors, assisting with daily tasks such as housework, meal preparation, shopping, transportation to appointments, pet care, home safety, minor repairs, and yard work. The program is volunteer-driven and professionally supported. Volunteer opportunities are available. 517 Edwards Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Companion Care: For individuals aged 65 and older who live independently in their homes and are socially isolated, with no significant cognitive impairment. Volunteers: Varies per assignment Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Companion Care: Varies per assignment Email (541) 646-7385 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 646-7385 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Companion Care: Call or visit website for more information Volunteers: Visit website to apply online FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Coos, Jackson, Josephine, Klamath, and Lincoln Counties SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: North on Riverside, left on Edwards. South on Court, left on Edwards. Across the street from the back of Kids Unlimited. Services: Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Older Adults Friendly Outreach Programs * Older Adults Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services * Older Adults Housekeeping Assistance * Older Adults In Home Meal Preparation * Older Adults Senior Ride Programs Volunteer Opportunities Yard Maintenance * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - YOUTH SHELTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SAFE FAMILIES FOR CHILDREN If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEARTS WITH A MISSION MEDFORD
